functional_requirements.title: Credit Score Retrieval on Opt-In
functional_requirements.description: The system shall retrieve the customer's credit score from at least one CRA (Experian, Equifax, or TransUnion) upon customer opt-in.

metadata.reasoning: Generated SEPA payment story based on PSD2 requirements from domain KB.

citation.source_reference: System shall retrieve credit score from at least one CRA on customer opt-in

trajectory.detail: Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

non_functional_requirements.title: Score Retrieval Response Time
non_functional_requirements.description: Credit score retrieval shall complete in less than 3 seconds end-to-end.
non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit measurable performance target provided in the source.

trajectory.detail: Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

constraints.description: Mobile app must be built for iOS and Android platforms

citation.source_reference: Mobile app for iOS and Android

constraints.reasoning: Fixed platform decision — not negotiable. Constrains technology choices to cross-platform or dual native development.

assumptions.description: The merchant analytics dashboard will be a web application (not mobile), as it is targeted at marketing managers who work from desktops
assumptions.reasoning: Source says consumer web UI is out of scope but does not specify the merchant dashboard platform. Marketing managers typically use desktop tools. If wrong, merchant dashboard would need to be mobile-native too.

gaps.description: No authentication or authorization approach specified for users or merchants
gaps.impact: Cannot design login flow, session management, role-based access, or security architecture
gaps.suggested_question: What authentication methods should be supported? (email/password, social login, biometric, SSO for merchants?)
gaps.reasoning: Source implies users are 'logged in' (AC4) and merchants 'log into the dashboard' (AC9) but never defines how. Authentication is foundational to all personalized features.
